title: Feature Fill
description: Tries to fills in the gaps of missing features/parity
body:
A Mod that generally keeps it close to vanilla & mainly changes mechanics

**Changes**  
Better Bucket Filling Conversion Fluids "Like Water" doesn't consume the fluid if >= 2 same fluid next target block"  
Avoid Placing blocks in fluids that gets replaced by said fluids  
More blocks can be waterlogged now  
Armor Stand now haves Arms "No Arms if shift"  
**Adds**  
Camera Shake Command  
Nickname Command
